# Aleksandar Radivojević — Full-Stack Web Developer

> Freelance full-stack developer based in Leskovac, Serbia, building websites
> and web applications for small and mid-sized businesses. Works in Serbian and
> English. Available for new projects.

Contact: aradivojevic.dev@outlook.com · +381 61 2308 522
Location: Leskovac, Serbia — works remotely across Serbia and internationally.

## Services

- Presentation websites and landing pages for local businesses
- E-commerce stores and custom online sales systems
- Custom web applications (booking, CRM, internal tools)
- Ongoing maintenance, hosting support, and iterative improvements

## Work

- [Skedio — scheduling and CRM SaaS](https://alexrad.dev/en/work/skedio):
  a booking and client-management product for Serbian appointment-based
  businesses: 24/7 online booking, team calendar, client records, automated
  reminders. Built and maintained solo.
- [Optika Cajs — online store and lens configurator](https://alexrad.dev/en/work/optika-cajs):
  a complete online system for a local optical shop, including an online store,
  a prescription-lens configurator, and eye-exam booking.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://alexrad.dev/en)
- [Home (Serbian)](https://alexrad.dev/sr)

## Notes

Content is available in both English (`/en`) and Serbian (`/sr`); the two are
full translations of each other, not partial. Case studies are first-hand
accounts of work delivered by Aleksandar Radivojević personally.
